calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment By Court (C.C.P.585 (B) & (D)) (Other)
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Joel Kelly.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:54:11 a.m. and concluding at 11:07:14 a.m.(D505)

James Nielsen, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Securitas Foundation via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Joel Kelly not appearing.
Witness John Hendrickson sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel to provide a summary and offers proof as to the request for judgment to the court.
Counsel examines witness.
Court examines witness. Witness confirms that declarations and statements made are true and correct.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

Damages $100,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $1,877.94
Total Judgment $101,877.94

Proposed judgment as amended is signed and executed this day.

Motion For Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment By Court (C.C.P.585 (B) & (D)) (Other)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Prove Up Hearing For Default Judgment By Court (C.C.P.585 (B) & (D)) (Other)
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Continued To Apr-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:29 am, pausing at 9:42 am, resuming at 11:07 am and concluding at 11:13 am.

Plaintiff The Securitas Foundation Corporation is represented by James C. Nielson, Esq.
Defendant Joel Kelly not appearing.

The Court addresses Plaintiff's counsel regarding the proof of service of the statment of damages.

The Court finds that the statment of damages has not been properly served upon Defendant,
The Court also requires a witness to appear on behalf of the Plaintiff.

The matter is continued to April 18, 2025 at 9:00 am in Dept 505.
